itemListElement.reviewBody: I would like to add on a crisp comment... Am not sure about the teaching but am very disappointed about how could a PRINCIPAL be so rude with the parents and give bad comments on a child who came for the admission and who doesn't belong to their school... I would not even give a single star for the school all because of the way me and my child was treated by the school by the so called """PRINCIPAL""" school will lose its reputation because of this cause

itemReviewed.name: ALPHA MATRICULATION HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL - Sembakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
I went to this school recently for my kids admission. I was made to wait for total 3.5 hrs to clear small interview process of my child and then to meet Principal. Following are some of serious problems I have encountered:
1. Admin staffs are rude, unprofessional don’t know how to greet parents which was first impression. We were not properly informed what is the procedure/process followed and how long it’s expected to take overall.
2. It’s ideally first come-first serve basis. But parents who came after me (1 hr later) are allowed to meet principal but not me and my child are allowed even after clearing interview. After completing my entire process, I demanded admin staff for a valid reason why they were allowing people who came late after me but they were ignorant. This is not fair, we were not even asked permission for allowing someone else in our turn. It’s purely like a govt office they can allow anyone in any order. I kept my small baby at home with my patterns but waiting long time allowing others in our turn is what reality.
3. Zero hygiene- In front of main entrance in Sembakkam there are many Beef shops which is annoying and unhygienic especially very next to school entrance. If you go by car you will not end up finding space for your car. There is zero space. So be prepared.
4. Unprofessional Principal: She is above 45+ but doesn’t know how to kindly/friendly greet parents and kids. She was not ready to explain any special thing and proud about their school. They need only top students filtering starts from KG itself which is a crime and pure descrimination. She is rude and their attitude shows that they are like top IIT/IIM in country. Their motive is 100% money minded and fees structure is one of costliest in neighboring areas.
5. Fees: They charge around 80k as total fees a year  for KG and Transportation around 40k year Think twice thrice before taking admission.
How would a parent expect a quality education and discipline of school management and principal doesn’t even practice it first?

itemReviewed.name: ALPHA MATRICULATION HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL - Sembakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Govt employees on corporation office works better than this school accounts, administration and front office department persons.
They not even know how to greet the parents who came for admissions for their wards. Full of money minded.

Level of school can be judged only by the learning outcome. But here, the learned professionals in the above said departments are a well known example to judge about the level of this school which is 0 (zero).

If possible, please teach the professionals available in the above said departments on

1. How to greet parents
2. Explain Parents on why they need to admit their kids to your school
3. What's more special in your school comparing others.
4. What are the syllabus available, extra curricular activities.
5. Admission process
5. And finally, about the cost (fee structure and donation)

itemReviewed.name: ALPHA MATRICULATION HIGHER SECONDARY SCHOOL - Sembakkam

itemListElement.reviewBody: One of the best school in Chennai with top class faculty and facilities. Wasn't an international school when I completed my studies from here. Usually they use various experiments to basically make understand the working of any concept in real life. Sports is given importance irrespective of a comparatively small ground. Sometimes they tend to involve in students personal life , which isn't a positive. Staffs are very friendly, and all the events are conducted in grand fashion and manner. One of the best library with a huge variety of books, and well equipped labs. Also conduct occasional counseling classes for students. I would recommend this school for all students in the locality,but I'm not quite sure of the fee structure after it became an international school. 👍
